title: A Day Without Electricity
content: One evening, the electricity suddenly stopped in Mia’s apartment building. The lights turned off, the television went silent, and the internet stopped working immediately. At first, Mia felt frustrated because she planned to watch a movie after work. She lit a few candles and opened the windows to let fresh air inside. Outside, neighbors stood in the hallway talking and laughing together. Without her phone or television, Mia spent the evening reading an old book by candlelight. Surprisingly, the quiet night felt peaceful and relaxing.
